rulings.Case Title: TYRONE L. ADAMS VS. CHARLES L. EASLEY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn Requesting An Order Of The Court Reversing The Order Issued On Sept 30, 2020 Granting Gary Holbrok'S Mtn To Dismiss Complaint For Alleged Failure To Timely Serve Summons And Complaint; Etc
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 4, 2020 line 1. PLAINTIFF TYRONE ADAMS Notice of motion Requesting An Order Of The Court Reversing The Order Issued On Sept 30, 2020 Granting Gary Holbrok'S Mtn To Dismiss Complaint For Alleged Failure To Timely Serve Summons And Complaint is DENIED. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PEIXIA FUNG ET AL VS. TRUMARK COMPANIES, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Full Bright Properties, Llc, Et. Al., Notice Of Motion And Motion For The Following Orders: 1.To Extend The Time To Respond To The Cross-Complaint Under Ccp 1054(A) And 2.To Set Aside The Entry Of Default Against Cross-Defendants Full Bright Properties, Llc; Z-L Properties, Inc.; And 1554 Market St.Development, Llc. Pursuant To C.C.P.?473(B); Supporting Memorandum Of Law Supporting Declaration Of Leodis C. Matthews
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 4, 2020 line 2. Defendant Full Bright Properties, Llc, Et. Al., Notice Of Motion And Motion For The Following Orders: 1.To Extend The Time To Respond To The Cross-Complaint Under Ccp 1054(A) And 2.To Set Aside The Entry Of Default Against Cross-Defendants Full Bright Properties, Llc; Z-L Properties, Inc.; And 1554 Market St.Development, Llc. Pursuant To C.C.P.?473(B) is GRANTED. By no later than 9:00 a.m. moving party to file a declaration with proposed code-compliant answer attached. By no later than 9:00 a.m. opposing party to file a declaration detailing fees and costs incurred in obtaining June 9, 2020 default and opposing this motion. =(501/CFH)
